scripts.validate: pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm check && pnpm test && tofu fmt -check -recursive infrastructure/ && tofu -chdir=infrastructure/dev validate
scripts.start: pnpm --filter workflows build && PERSISTENCE_PATH=$PWD/.persistence pnpm --filter @workflow-engine/runtime start
scripts.infra:up:build: podman build -t localhost/workflow-engine:dev -f infrastructure/Dockerfile . && pnpm infra:up
